name: SIERRA ONCOLOGY INC
summary: SIERRA ONCOLOGY INC is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapies for the treatment of rare forms of cancer. Their lead product candidate is momelotinib, a JAK1/JAK2 and ACVR1 inhibitor, with headquarters located in San Mateo, California. Sierra Oncology aims to improve patient outcomes by addressing unmet medical needs in specific cancer subtypes.
